batch_summary: Deed [321] analyzed — LC Inst# 07903577, Affidavit of No Inheritance Tax Due for Estate of John Pierce Black (Probate No. 4476), filed by estate attorney M. Stephen Beard of Pakis, Cherry, Beard & Giotes, Inc. Dated May 8, 1979; filed May 10; recorded May 11, 1979 in Limestone County at Pg. 821. Includes Comptroller certificate of no tax due (Exhibit A) and certificate releasing Olena Bounds Black (Independent Executrix) from personal liability (Exhibit B), both signed by Comptroller Bob Bullock on April 27, 1979. Corrects prior misdescription as a 'JP Black deceased affidavit' — this is a tax clearance instrument, not a death/heirship affidavit. ISSUE-43 item 21 marked as pulled.

operations.replace_with: | 5/10–11/1979 | **Deed [321]**: Affidavit of No Inheritance Tax Due, Estate of John Pierce Black (Probate No. 4476, Limestone County). Filed by M. Stephen Beard, Attorney of Record (Pakis, Cherry, Beard & Giotes, Inc., Waco). Comptroller Bob Bullock issued certificate of no tax due (4/27/1979, Exhibit A) and released Olena Bounds Black, Independent Executrix (Route 1, Box 166, Wortham, Texas 76693), from personal liability (4/27/1979, Exhibit B). Filed 5/10/1979 8:00 AM; recorded 5/11/1979 4:00 PM by Dena Pruitt, County Clerk, Limestone County (Deputy: Nancy Stockton). LC Vol. 640 Pg. 821, Inst# 07903577. No federal estate tax liability. operations.anchor: 5. `1995-03-06_[12]_f` — NationsBank of Texas N.A. (succ. to Citizens National Bank) + Olena Bounds Black → M. Stephen Beard as Successor Co-Trustee (distribution deed, Freestone only; Beard replaces NationsBank as co-trustee) [INDEX CONFIRMED (F-Beard): FC OR/953/40, Doc# 1995-1165, 2026-03-09; ⚠️ grantor indexed as "BLACK JOHN PIERCE FAMILY TRUST OF 1977" — indexing convention, not conflict; instrument controls]
operations.content: 6. `1979-05-08_[321]_l` — M. Stephen Beard (Attorney of Record, Estate of JP Black) → Public (affidavit, Limestone only; LC Vol. 640 Pg. 821, Inst# 07903577; filed 5/10/1979, recorded 5/11/1979). **Affidavit of No Inheritance Tax Due** — Probate No. 4476, Limestone County. Beard attests no state inheritance tax and no federal estate tax due on Estate of John Pierce Black, Deceased. Comptroller Bob Bullock certificates attached (Exhibits A & B, both dated 4/27/1979): (A) no inheritance tax due, (B) release of Olena Bounds Black, Independent Executrix (Route 1, Box 166, Wortham, Texas 76693), from personal liability. Sworn McLennan County before notary Margaret Dickens (comm. exp. 8/31/1980). Tax clearance instrument — no conveyance; clears estate for distribution prior to trust funding deeds [08] and [26] (both executed 5/23/1979, 13 days later).
